alt: Close-up of an adult male mandrill's brightly colored red and blue face
caption: The vivid red and blue face of a dominant male mandrill — its bright colors help mandrills recognize and communicate with each other.
attributionText: Photo by Rolf Dietrich Brecher via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
attributionHtml: Photo by Rolf Dietrich Brecher via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
acquisitionNotes: Added core closeup image for the 'Coloring and communication' section, which previously had no image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/53/Said_red-nose-day%2C_man%3F%3F%3F_%2815583038206%29.jpg
